production_unchanged.ROLL7: Rescue30 only when A1/X2/X3 all A0

xien2_confluence_router.triple_pass: Exclude every A1-related pair; keep all pairs inside X2 union X3
xien2_confluence_router.promotion_gate: Prospective same-day comparison; positive incremental P/L; coverage unchanged; drawdown not worse; no rule change mid-audit

triple_confluence_normalizer.trigger: A1, X2 and X3 all pass on the same draw
triple_confluence_normalizer.shadow_staking: A1 Core main100 unchanged; each A1 50-point leg becomes 30; X2/X3 remain 50; dedupe by max stake
triple_confluence_normalizer.promotion_gate: More triple-pass samples required; shadow only until independent prospective evidence

operational_rule: Both challengers are calculated at 08:00 and 19:30, logged separately, displayed on the website, and never mutate actual orders or booked P/L without a separate explicit promotion decision.
